fileSummary.generationHeader: This file is a merged representation of the entire codebase, combined into a single document by Repomix.
fileSummary.purpose:
This file contains a packed representation of the entire repository's contents.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.
fileSummary.fileFormat:
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files, each consisting of:
   - File path as a key
   - Full contents of the file as the value
fileSummary.usageGuidelines:
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.
fileSummary.notes:
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

files.Backend/prisma/migrations/migration_lock:
# Please do not edit this file manually
# It should be added in your version-control system (e.g., Git)
provider = "postgresql"
files.Backend/prisma/schema.prisma:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client"
  output   = "../generated/prisma"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

model Alarm {
  id             Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  tag            String
  alarm          String
  priority       Int
  class          Int
  status         Int
  timestamp1     DateTime
  timestamp2     DateTime?
  acknowledgment Boolean   @default(false)

  @@index([tag, timestamp2])
  @@index([timestamp1])
}

model TelemetryData {
  id         Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  country    String
  region     String
  area       String
  cgs        String
  station    String
  compressor String
  point      String
  parameter  String
  tag        String @unique
}

model Country {
  id   Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name String @unique

  @@map("country")
}

model Region {
  id       Int                      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name     String
  country  String
  boundary Unsupported("geometry")?

  @@unique([name, country])
  @@index([boundary], map: "idx_region_boundary", type: Gist)
  @@map("region")
}

model Area {
  id       Int                      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name     String
  region   String
  country  String
  boundary Unsupported("geometry")?

  @@unique([name, region])
  @@index([boundary], map: "idx_area_boundary", type: Gist)
  @@map("area")
}

model Cgs {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, area])
  @@map("cgs")
}

model Station {
  id           Int                      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name         String
  cgs          String
  area         String
  region       String
  country      String
  location     Unsupported("geometry")?
  station_type station_type             @default(online_station)
  status       station_status           @default(offline)

  @@unique([name, cgs])
  @@index([location], map: "idx_station_location", type: Gist)
  @@map("station")
}

model Compressor {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  station String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, station])
  @@map("compressor")
}

model Dispenser {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  station String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, station])
  @@map("dispenser")
}

model Device {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  station String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, station])
  @@map("device")
}

model Png {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, cgs])
  @@map("png")
}

model Lcng {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, cgs])
  @@map("lcng")
}

model Drs {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, png])
  @@map("drs")
}

model Industrial {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  drs     String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, drs])
  @@map("industrial")
}

model Commercial {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  drs     String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, drs])
  @@map("commercial")
}

model Domestic {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  drs     String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, drs])
  @@map("domestic")
}

model User {
  id             Int            @id @default(autoincrement())
  first_name     String
  last_name      String
  email          String         @unique
  password       String
  phone          String?
  is_active      Boolean        @default(true)
  created_at     DateTime       @default(now())
  updated_at     DateTime       @updatedAt
  role_id        Int
  refresh_tokens RefreshToken[]
  access         UserAccess?
  role           Role           @relation(fields: [role_id], references: [id])

  @@map("users")
}

model Role {
  id               Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  name             String           @unique
  role_permissions RolePermission[]
  users            User[]

  @@map("roles")
}

model Permission {
  id               Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  name             String           @unique
  description      String?
  role_permissions RolePermission[]

  @@map("permissions")
}

model RolePermission {
  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  role_id       Int
  permission_id Int
  permission    Permission @relation(fields: [permission_id], references: [id])
  role          Role       @relation(fields: [role_id], references: [id])

  @@unique([role_id, permission_id])
  @@map("role_permissions")
}

model UserAccess {
  id       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id  Int      @unique
  level    String
  regions  String[]
  areas    String[]
  stations String[]
  user     User     @relation(fields: [user_id], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_access")
}

model RefreshToken {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  token      String   @unique
  user_id    Int
  expires_at DateTime
  created_at DateTime @default(now())
  user       User     @relation(fields: [user_id], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade, onUpdate: NoAction)

  @@map("refresh_tokens")
}

model LoginLog {
  id             Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id        Int?
  email          String
  status         String
  failure_reason String?
  ip_address     String?
  user_agent     String?
  os             String?
  browser        String?
  device_type    String?
  login_at       DateTime @default(now())
  request_id     String?

  @@index([email])
  @@index([login_at])
  @@index([ip_address])
  @@map("login_logs")
}

model EventLog {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id    Int?
  email      String?
  role       String?
  endpoint   String?
  method     String?
  params     Json?
  ip_address String?
  user_agent String?
  request_id String?
  created_at DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([email])
  @@index([created_at])
  @@map("event_logs")
}

model TransactionLog {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id    Int?
  email      String?
  role       String?
  endpoint   String?
  method     String?
  ip_address String?
  request_id String?
  created_at DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([email])
  @@index([created_at])
  @@map("transaction_logs")
}

model ErrorLog {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id    Int?
  email      String?
  role       String?
  endpoint   String?
  method     String?
  error      String?
  ip_address String?
  request_id String?
  created_at DateTime @default(now())
  user_agent String?

  @@index([email])
  @@index([created_at])
  @@map("error_logs")
}

/// This table contains check constraints and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/check-constraints for more info.
model spatial_ref_sys {
  srid      Int     @id
  auth_name String? @db.VarChar(256)
  auth_srid Int?
  srtext    String? @db.VarChar(2048)
  proj4text String? @db.VarChar(2048)
}

/// This table is a partition table and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/partition-tables for more info.
model History {
  id           BigInt   @default(autoincrement())
  telemetry_id Int
  value        Float
  quality      Int
  timestamp    DateTime @db.Timestamp(6)

  @@id([id, timestamp])
}

enum station_status {
  online
  offline
  fault
  maintenance
}

enum station_type {
  online_station
  mother_station
  booster_station
  daughter_station
}

files.GIS/prisma/schema.prisma:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client"
  output   = "../generated/prisma"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

model Alarm {
  id             Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  tag            String
  alarm          String
  priority       Int
  class          Int
  status         Int
  timestamp1     DateTime
  timestamp2     DateTime?
  acknowledgment Boolean   @default(false)

  @@index([tag, timestamp2])
  @@index([timestamp1])
}

model TelemetryData {
  id         Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  country    String
  region     String
  area       String
  cgs        String
  station    String
  compressor String
  point      String
  parameter  String
  tag        String @unique
}

model Country {
  id   Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name String @unique

  @@map("country")
}

model Region {
  id       Int                      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name     String
  country  String
  boundary Unsupported("geometry")?

  @@unique([name, country])
  @@index([boundary], map: "idx_region_boundary", type: Gist)
  @@map("region")
}

model Area {
  id       Int                      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name     String
  region   String
  country  String
  boundary Unsupported("geometry")?

  @@unique([name, region])
  @@index([boundary], map: "idx_area_boundary", type: Gist)
  @@map("area")
}

model Cgs {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, area])
  @@map("cgs")
}

enum StationType {
  online_station
  mother_station
  booster_station
  daughter_station
}

enum StationStatus {
  online
  offline
  fault
  maintenance
}

model Station {
  id           Int                      @id @default(autoincrement())
  name         String
  cgs          String
  area         String
  region       String
  country      String
  location     Unsupported("geometry")?
  station_type StationType              @default(online_station)
  status       StationStatus            @default(offline)

  @@unique([name, cgs])
  @@index([location], map: "idx_station_location", type: Gist)
  @@map("station")
}

model Compressor {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  station String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, station])
  @@map("compressor")
}

model Dispenser {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  station String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, station])
  @@map("dispenser")
}

model Device {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  station String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, station])
  @@map("device")
}

model Png {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, cgs])
  @@map("png")
}

model Lcng {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, cgs])
  @@map("lcng")
}

model Drs {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, png])
  @@map("drs")
}

model Industrial {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  drs     String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, drs])
  @@map("industrial")
}

model Commercial {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  drs     String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, drs])
  @@map("commercial")
}

model Domestic {
  id      Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  name    String
  drs     String
  png     String
  cgs     String
  area    String
  region  String
  country String

  @@unique([name, drs])
  @@map("domestic")
}

model User {
  id             Int            @id @default(autoincrement())
  first_name     String
  last_name      String
  email          String         @unique
  password       String
  phone          String?
  is_active      Boolean        @default(true)
  created_at     DateTime       @default(now())
  updated_at     DateTime       @updatedAt
  role_id        Int
  refresh_tokens RefreshToken[]
  access         UserAccess?
  role           Role           @relation(fields: [role_id], references: [id])

  @@map("users")
}

model Role {
  id               Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  name             String           @unique
  role_permissions RolePermission[]
  users            User[]

  @@map("roles")
}

model Permission {
  id               Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  name             String           @unique
  description      String?
  role_permissions RolePermission[]

  @@map("permissions")
}

model RolePermission {
  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  role_id       Int
  permission_id Int
  permission    Permission @relation(fields: [permission_id], references: [id])
  role          Role       @relation(fields: [role_id], references: [id])

  @@unique([role_id, permission_id])
  @@map("role_permissions")
}

model UserAccess {
  id       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id  Int      @unique
  level    String
  regions  String[]
  areas    String[]
  stations String[]
  user     User     @relation(fields: [user_id], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_access")
}

model RefreshToken {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  token      String   @unique
  user_id    Int
  expires_at DateTime
  created_at DateTime @default(now())
  user       User     @relation(fields: [user_id], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade, onUpdate: NoAction)

  @@map("refresh_tokens")
}

model LoginLog {
  id             Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id        Int?
  email          String
  status         String
  failure_reason String?
  ip_address     String?
  user_agent     String?
  os             String?
  browser        String?
  device_type    String?
  login_at       DateTime @default(now())
  request_id     String?

  @@index([email])
  @@index([login_at])
  @@index([ip_address])
  @@map("login_logs")
}

model EventLog {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id    Int?
  email      String?
  role       String?
  endpoint   String?
  method     String?
  params     Json?
  ip_address String?
  user_agent String?
  request_id String?
  created_at DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([email])
  @@index([created_at])
  @@map("event_logs")
}

model TransactionLog {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id    Int?
  email      String?
  role       String?
  endpoint   String?
  method     String?
  ip_address String?
  request_id String?
  created_at DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([email])
  @@index([created_at])
  @@map("transaction_logs")
}

model ErrorLog {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  user_id    Int?
  email      String?
  role       String?
  endpoint   String?
  method     String?
  error      String?
  ip_address String?
  request_id String?
  created_at DateTime @default(now())
  user_agent String?

  @@index([email])
  @@index([created_at])
  @@map("error_logs")
}

/// This table contains check constraints and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/check-constraints for more info.
model spatial_ref_sys {
  srid      Int     @id
  auth_name String? @db.VarChar(256)
  auth_srid Int?
  srtext    String? @db.VarChar(2048)
  proj4text String? @db.VarChar(2048)
}

/// This table is a partition table and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/partition-tables for more info.
model History {
  id           BigInt   @default(autoincrement())
  telemetry_id Int
  value        Float
  quality      Int
  timestamp    DateTime @db.Timestamp(6)

  @@id([id, timestamp])
}
